reviews.text: I am absolutely appalled by my experience at this clinic in Central London. I went for an egg count as part of my egg freezing journey. Let me be clear—the scan itself was fantastic. The practitioner was incredible, easily the best I’ve …

I was not impressed by the treatment I received.  I had the very same procedure under the NHS several weeks later, and it was more thorough and detailed and provided significantly better feedback. The BUPA consultant didn’t seem to be able …

While the radiographers and assistants were very friendly and knowledgeable (which is why I’ve given a star to this review) and can’t talk about the for the other doctors here who maybe more competent but I found Miss Heather Evans’ care …

Both medically and administratively incompetent- do not go here. The NHS is materially better. I made an appointment to see Dr Heather Evans (based on a google search rather than a recommendation) as I was incredibly tired and wanted to …

The gynaecologist with whom I had my appointment was knowledgeable for sure but I felt like the £310 I paid for the consultation were not worth the service or how she spoke to me. I wish she showed a little bit more empathy and reassurance (for that price).

I came in for a pap smear and the doctor who attended me seemed like she wanted to be anywhere else but there and rushed the entire thing. Additionally, I received a 1 minute call a week later informing me of my results, which I was never …

The surgeon MR Muglu is very warm and friendly. His assistant was also friendly. The appointment was Quick and handled efficiently however I think that for the amount of money I paid for this surgery I did not feel like I got value added …
